title: Handle a common sales objection without being pushy

vars.objection: This is too expensive. We already pay for three tools that overlap with what you do.
vars.product: A CRM that consolidates contact management, email sequences, and deal tracking into one platform

criteria: Explicitly acknowledges the cost concern rather than dismissing or ignoring it
Reframes with a specific benefit (e.g. consolidation saving tool costs) rather than a vague value claim
Ends with a low-pressure next step (e.g. a short call, a trial, a cost comparison) without pressuring or offering unverified discounts
